options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <llx> # lower left x coordinate of the bounding box (float, required) <lly> # lower left y coordinate of the bounding box (float, required) <urx> # upper right x coordinate of the bounding box (float, required) <ury> # upper right y coordinate of the bounding box (float, required) <name> # name of the routing blockage (string, required) <layers> # the layer(s) and/or via(s) (string, required) <attr> # attribute of the routing blockage, {Undefined|Fills|Slots|Partial Pushdown EXCEPTPGNET|PGNETONLY|ALLNET} (string, optional) <spacing> # minimum spacing between layers within the routing blockage or effective width of the routing blockage {-spacing | -designRuleWidth}
